raw_model_answer:
STEP 1: Remove the person from the contaminated area immediately.
STEP 2: Keep the person resting.
STEP 3: Seek medical attention if symptoms develop or persist.
DO NOT: Keep working in the contaminated area.
ESCALATE: Seek medical attention.

immediate_steps: Remove the person from the contaminated area immediately.
Seek medical attention if symptoms develop or persist.
do_not_do: Keep working in the contaminated area.
